## [00:00 - 01:42]

Hi, hello. My name is Vin Jang and I've been teaching communication skills and public speaking now for more than 10 years. I know I'm getting old. And I'd love to invite you to a free 90-minute webinar with me. It's going to be live. I've obsessed my entire life over what makes a great communicator in a one-to-one situation, in a one-to-ten situation, or even a one-to-ten thousand type scenario. What makes these people great? What I've learned as a teacher over many years is that people who improve the skill of communication have more influence. They have more influence in their personal lives and they have more influence in their professional lives. People often in awe of this ability, however, they never start their communication skills journey not because they're not capable. There are actually three things that stop people from even starting their communication skills journey. Three things that's taken me over 10 years to learn and that's why I'm putting on this live, free 90-minute webinar where we're going to deep dive into the three things that stop people from even starting their journey to improve their communication ability. And once you learn these three things, you're going to be able to begin the journey of mastering a skill set that's going to allow you to negotiate any reality you desire. My friends, I cannot wait to see you. I know we've got people who are going to join us from all over the world. To save your spot in my masterclass, check out the comment section. My team will drop a link there so you're able to register. Learn this one skill and reality becomes negotiable. You can negotiate whatever reality you desire. Looking forward to seeing you at the webinar.
